## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if applicable.

## Environment

- **macOS version**: (e.g., 14.2)
- **Shell**: (e.g., zsh 5.9)
- **iTerm2 version**: (e.g., 3.5.0)
- **Install method**: (fresh install / upgrade)
- **Relevant flags used**: (e.g., `--skip-brew`)
